Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm sorry to disturb you, but do you have a moment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}There's actually something I need to tell everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...But, I think it would be best if you saw it for yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So I'd like for all of us to meet in the command room tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That's okay. Just listen through the door.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's something I need to tell everyone, so let's all meet in the command room tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That's all I wanted to say. I'll see you then.[n]{f 1 1}
